{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged rings
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel]] can create [[Forged rings]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The echo of an [[Archlord]] uses [[Forged rings]] as weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
